title: fraxinus americana var. pubescens
intro: Fraxinus americana var. pubescens, also known as the American green ash, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America that is characterized by its smooth, gray bark and compound leaves with 9-11 leaflets. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fraxinus americana var. pubescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
